itinerary.title: SAN arrival
itinerary.detail: Arrives San Diego (SAN) 11:15, Jun 20. Cross-border pickup arranged.

itinerary.title: Airport -> hotel (cross-border)
itinerary.detail: Driver meets at SAN arrivals and escorts across the border to the hotel.

itinerary.title: Hotel check-in
itinerary.detail: Grand Hotel Tijuana. Reservation under Diego Ramirez. Single guest.

itinerary.title: FUE hair transplant
itinerary.detail: Full-day procedure Jun 21 at Clinica Capilar Pacifico.

itinerary.title: Post-op wash and check
itinerary.detail: First wash and graft check Jun 23 at the clinic.

care_instructions.title: Blood thinners and alcohol
care_instructions.body: Avoid aspirin, ibuprofen, and other blood thinners for 7 days before the procedure, and avoid alcohol for 3 days before, to reduce bleeding during graft extraction.

care_instructions.title: Smoking and nicotine
care_instructions.body: Stop nicotine for at least 1 week before the transplant. Nicotine constricts blood vessels and reduces graft survival.

care_instructions.title: Day-of preparation
care_instructions.body: Wash your hair the morning of the procedure with regular shampoo, do not apply any product, and wear a button-up shirt so you do not pull anything over your head afterward.

care_instructions.title: Food before procedure
care_instructions.body: Eat a normal breakfast the morning of the procedure unless told otherwise. FUE is performed under local anesthetic, so fasting is generally not required.

care_instructions.title: Post-op graft care
care_instructions.body: Graft-care and washing instructions are personalized by the clinic after the procedure and are not yet finalized. Any post-op question must be confirmed with the clinic.
